summary: A 1985 U.S. Embassy Port Moresby cable reports that Papua New Guinea's National Intelligence Organization inquired about sightings of high-altitude, high-speed aircraft-like objects with lights and contrails observed on the night of January 24, including a pilot's radar contact and multiple ground witnesses; U.S. officials stated they had no record of B-52 or other U.S. aircraft in PNG airspace that day.
